venues.name: Groove
venues.description: Vietnamese cafe that's been all over everyone's FYP. The vibe is immaculate and it gets packed fast, but the service is super quick.
venues.mustTry: Salted cream coffee ($9.80), Zen bloom ($8.70), matcha basque cheesecake, garlic cheese bread

venues.name: Juniper
venues.description: Home of Melbourne's most talked-about coffee frappe. Inspired by Greek frappes, this TikTok sensation is rich, creamy, and perfectly sweet.
venues.mustTry: Famous coffee frappe, chicken roll with crispy skin

venues.name: The Butter Room
venues.description: Cozy Korean pastry paradise. The moment you step in, you're surrounded by unique pastries and desserts that look like art pieces.
venues.mustTry: Injeolmi Pandoro (the icon), tiramisu croissant, tissue bread, Korean dumplings pie

venues.name: Assembly
venues.description: Behind a warehouse roller door, this second location also functions as a cellar door for non-alc label Tina. Signature drinks that push boundaries.
venues.mustTry: Dunkaccino (half filter coffee, half hot chocolate), shan cha (mountain tea from Taiwan), Tina non-alc drinks

venues.name: Nimbo
venues.description: Viral matcha and latte dessert cafe hidden in a Melbourne alleyway. Cozy winter menu with creative flavor combinations that actually work.
venues.mustTry: Ube matcha, banana croissant pudding, hojicha hot chocolate, hot Earl Grey matcha

venues.name: The Glass Den
venues.description: The most aesthetic cafe in Melbourne right now. Their brunch dishes are as beautiful as they are delicious, and the space is absolutely Instagram-worthy.
venues.mustTry: Viral Italian hot chocolate, new brunch dishes, strawberry matcha latte

venues.name: Standing Room
venues.description: Latest creation is making waves: a sweet-tart showstopper using old-school drinking vinegar. Bold, experimental, and uniquely Melbourne.
venues.mustTry: Cherry Shrub Spider (fruit vinegar over ice with lemon cream)

venues.name: Bottari
venues.description: Seoul's TRNDIE cafe culture comes to Melbourne. Famous for viral doughnut drinks that are as chic as they are delicious, crowned with caramel cream "doughnuts".
venues.mustTry: Doughnut lattes (chai cinnamon, chocolate, matcha), Kkwabaegi (twisted Korean donuts), Jasmine Cloud

venues.name: In Btwn
venues.description: Somewhere between a cafe and a bar, this TRNDIE spot serves creative drinks with unique twists. Warm orange lighting draws you in from the laneway.
venues.mustTry: In Btwn Dirty ($6.50) with orange zest, Einspanner ($9.50), Matcha Einspanner

venues.name: Trbl
venues.description: Korean cafe bringing new energy to this classic street art laneway. Small but perfectly formed with Plot bakery goods and specialty drinks.
venues.mustTry: Sea salt chai latte, Korean salt bread (sogum), vanilla bean latte
